symptom: drone emits file_edit with old_content that differs from file content by whitespace / underscores-vs-hyphens / quote style; existing error dumps the full file but doesn't name the closest actual line
root_cause: find-string divergence is usually a character-level drift, not a structural one — the drone's mental model of a token is close but not exact; naming the closest actual line short-circuits the 'scan the preview' step
fix_approach: extend 'Text not found' error with a difflib-based closest-match hint. Only surface when ratio>0.6 to avoid coincidental JSON brace matches. Keep the existing full-file preview as fallback.
principle: v5 — one concrete signal beats a 40-line preview the drone has to re-parse

desc: underscore-vs-hyphen drift — classic JSON key mismatch
totally unrelated find string — no hint
